title: Project Report: Sales Dashboard from CSV — Data Analyst
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Clean a messy sales CSV with pandas, analyze trends, and build charts in Excel + matplotlib.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**Sales Dashboard from CSV** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for Data Analyst. Duration: 1–2 weeks. Clean a messy sales CSV with pandas, analyze trends, and build charts in Excel + matplotlib. Tools: Python, pandas, matplotlib, Excel.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Load and clean CSV data
Objective: Calculate KPIs (revenue, growth)
Objective: Create 5 charts
Objective: Write 2-page summary report
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Data Analyst portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Data Analyst resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Data Analyst resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Clean
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Clean** *(Level: Beginner)*

Handle missing values and types. Complete these tasks: dropna; astype. Deliverable for this phase: clean_sales.csv.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] dropna
- [ ] astype
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Clean is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Data Analyst agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the clean_sales.csv to the teacher.

chapters.title: Phase: Analyze
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Analyze** *(Level: Beginner)*

Groupby and pivot tables. Complete these tasks: Monthly revenue; Top products. Deliverable for this phase: KPI spreadsheet.

Code Reference:

- [ ] Top products
```

Code Reference:

- [ ] Excel charts
```

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: Clean dataset; Chart pack; Executive summary PDF. Skills demonstrated: pandas, Excel, Visualization. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Clean dataset
Deliverable: Chart pack
Deliverable: Executive summary PDF
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Clean dataset and passes the rubric.
